Check_Routine_Result_Roll.comment:
"Check Aiming Roll Result (For ""Aiming Check Mode"", this result for Roll.)

lists.3: TAC converged successfully but the result exceeds the max roll angle threshold
lists.4: TAC converged successfully but the result exceed the min/max horizon and/or yaw
lists.6: Distance to target out of valid range
lists.7: Square side size (or radius) is out of valid logical range - defined target size is too small to be recognized.
lists.8: TAC2 converged successfully but the result exceeds the min/max yaw
lists.9: TAC2 converged successfully but the result exceeds the min/max horizon

TAC2_Negative_Response.comment:
"Aiming NG Reason (When Aiming Result is ""NOK"", this reason is displayed.)

TAC2_Result_Roll.comment:

TAC2_Result_Pitch.comment:
